headline: Pacira to Divest iovera Business to Zimmer Biomet in Up To $140M Deal
summary: PCRX is set to sell its iovera franchise to ZBH in a deal worth up to $140M as it sharpens focus on biopharmaceutical growth.

raw.headline: Pacira to Divest iovera Business to Zimmer Biomet in Up To $140M Deal
raw.summary: PCRX is set to sell its iovera franchise to ZBH in a deal worth up to $140M as it sharpens focus on biopharmaceutical growth.

headline: Zimmer Biomet to acquire iovera device from Pacira for $140m
summary: The milestone payments may be achieved up to and through 31 December 2031.
